scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/app && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/core && npm run test --workspace=packages/app && npm run test --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=packages/core && npm run test:coverage --workspace=packages/app && npm run test:coverage --workspace=packages/cli
